_publications._publicationTitle: Small Extracellular Vesicles Derived from NF2-Associated Schwannoma Cells Modulate Tumor Progression and Immunity via HSP90.

_contextSnippet: treatment with NF2-EVs HSP90OE significantly enhanced AKT phosphorylation in monocytes. Conversely, when exposed to NF2-EVs HSP90OE, we observed a marked decrease in AKT phosphorylation
details: Successfully detected enhanced AKT phosphorylation in monocytes treated with NF2-EVs HSP90OE and decreased phosphorylation with HSP90 knockdown
